import { useState, useRef, useCallback, useEffect } from "react"; import { motion, AnimatePresence, useScroll, useTransform, useInView } from "framer-motion"; // ── Constants ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── const STORY_STYLES = [ { id: "naughty", emoji: "😈", label: "调皮捣蛋", desc: "搞笑爆料·自我辩护风", color: "#FFB5C8", shadow: "#D98EA6", ring: "#E87AA0" }, { id: "warm", emoji: "🌸", label: "温馨治愈", desc: "暖心回忆·治愈日常风", color: "#FFE5A0", shadow: "#D4B860", ring: "#C8971E" }, { id: "adventure", emoji: "🚀", label: "大冒险", desc: "史诗探险·夸张英雄风", color: "#A8D8EA", shadow: "#6AAAC2", ring: "#3D8FAF" }, ]; const PALETTE = [ { color: "#FFE5A0", shadow: "#D4B860" }, { color: "#FFB5C8", shadow: "#D98EA6" }, { color: "#A8D8EA", shadow: "#6AAAC2" }, { color: "#C9B8F0", shadow: "#A090D0" }, ]; const DEMO_CHAPTERS = [ { emoji: "🌅", title: "第一章：完美的早晨", color: "#FFE5A0", shadow: "#D4B860", text: "每天清晨六点我准时踩上主人的脸——不是因为我饿，而是作为专业起床监督官这是我的天职。主人说我是天使，我知道那是因为他还没完全醒过来。" }, { emoji: "🛋️", title: "第二章：沙发改造计划", color: "#FFB5C8", shadow: "#D98EA6", text: "今天完成了一项重要室内设计工程。角落的填充物缺乏艺术感，我花了两小时将其重新诠释。主人回家时的表情证明了一切——他被我的创造力深深震撼了。" }, { emoji: "🌳", title: "第三章：庭院霸权之争", color: "#A8D8EA", shadow: "#6AAAC2", text: "那只松鼠再次越过我神圣的领地边界。我以迅雷不及掩耳之势发起冲锋，穿越草坪绕过花坛。虽然它最终爬上大树……但我用吠声宣告了精神上的胜利。" }, { emoji: "🌙", title: "第四章：夜晚的真相", color: "#C9B8F0", shadow: "#A090D0", text: "深夜，当主人进入梦乡，我悄悄占领了床的黄金地段。对角线躺姿能最大化覆盖面积，这是本人多年研究的睡眠科学。他蜷缩角落微笑——显然因我的陪伴而安心。" }, ]; // ── AI Story Generation ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────── async function generateStory(petName, description, styleId) { var guides = { naughty: "调皮捣蛋、略带自傲，用第一人称为自己的每一个破坏行为找借口，语气搞笑逻辑荒谬但言之凿凿", warm: "温柔治愈、充满爱意，用第一人称回忆与主人的温馨瞬间，每句话都让人心里暖暖的", adventure: "史诗冒险、夸张英雄主义，把散步说成远征，把抢食说成浴血奋战，语气宏大庄严", }; var guide = guides[styleId] || guides.naughty; var name = petName || "我"; var prompt = "你是一只宠物，用第一人称讲述自己的故事。\n" + "风格要求：" + guide + "\n" + "宠物名字：" + name + "\n" + "用户描述的事件：" + description + "\n\n" + "请生成恰好4个章节的故事，每章要有趣、有画面感、符合上述风格。\n" + "严格只返回如下JSON格式，不要有任何其他文字或代码块标记：\n" + "{\"chapters\":[{\"emoji\":\"...\",\"title\":\"第X章：标题\",\"text\":\"正文2-3句话\"},{\"emoji\":\"...\",\"title\":\"第X章：标题\",\"text\":\"正文2-3句话\"},{\"emoji\":\"...\",\"title\":\"第X章：标题\",\"text\":\"正文2-3句话\"},{\"emoji\":\"...\",\"title\":\"第X章：标题\",\"text\":\"正文2-3句话\"}]}"; var res = await fetch("https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages", { method: "POST", headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" }, body: JSON.stringify({ model: "claude-sonnet-4-20250514", max_tokens: 1000, messages: [{ role: "user", content: prompt }], }), }); if (!res.ok) throw new Error("API " + res.status); var data = await res.json(); var block = data.content.find(function(b) { return b.type === "text"; }); var raw = block ? block.text : ""; var clean = raw.replace(/```json|```/g, "").trim(); var parsed = JSON.parse(clean); return parsed.chapters.map(function(ch, i) { return Object.assign({}, ch, PALETTE[i % PALETTE.length]); }); } // ── FloatAnim ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── function FloatAnim(props) { return ( {props.children} ); } // ── ClayBtn ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── function ClayBtn(props) { var bg = props.disabled ? "#E8E8E8" : props.outline ? "transparent" : (props.gradient || "linear-gradient(135deg,#FFB5C8,#C9B8F0)"); var fg = props.disabled ? "#aaa" : props.outline ? "#E87AA0" : "#fff"; var bx = (props.disabled || props.outline) ? "none" : "0 6px 0 " + (props.shadow || "#D98EA6") + ", 0 10px 30px rgba(255,181,200,0.4)"; return ( {props.children} ); } // ── Parallax Background ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────── function ParallaxDecor() { var sc = useScroll(); var y1 = useTransform(sc.scrollY, [0, 800], [0, -120]); var y2 = useTransform(sc.scrollY, [0, 800], [0, -60]); var y3 = useTransform(sc.scrollY, [0, 800], [0, -180]); var r1 = useTransform(sc.scrollY, [0, 800], [0, 45]); return (
🦴 ⭐ 🐾 🦴 💫

 ); } // ── Editor View ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── function EditorView(props) { var petData = props.petData; var setPetData = props.setPetData; var setView = props.setView; var isGenerating = props.isGenerating; var setIsGenerating = props.setIsGenerating; var [error, setError] = useState(""); var fileRef = useRef(null); var handleImg = useCallback(function(e) { var f = e.target.files[0]; if (!f) return; var reader = new FileReader(); reader.onload = function(ev) { setPetData(function(d) { return Object.assign({}, d, { image: ev.target.result }); }); }; reader.readAsDataURL(f); }, [setPetData]); function set(field, val) { setPetData(function(d) { var next = Object.assign({}, d); next[field] = val; return next; }); } async function handleGenerate() { if (!petData.description.trim()) { setError("请描述一件宠物做过的趣事！"); return; } setError(""); setIsGenerating(true); try { var chapters = await generateStory(petData.name, petData.description, petData.style); setPetData(function(d) { return Object.assign({}, d, { chapters: chapters }); }); setView("preview"); } catch (e) { setError("生成失败，请重试 🙈（" + (e.message || "网络错误") + "）"); } finally { setIsGenerating(false); } } var inputBase = { width: "100%", boxSizing: "border-box", border: "2.5px solid #FFE0EC", borderRadius: 16, padding: "13px 16px", fontSize: 15, outline: "none", background: "#FFFAFC", fontFamily: "inherit", color: "#333", }; return (
